name: mapmat-backend
description: Map Mat - Visual sitemap generator backend

scripts.check:backend: node --check server.js && node --check db.js && node --check routes/auth.js && node --check routes/api.js && node scripts/check-db-boundary.js && node scripts/check-store-async-boundary.js && node scripts/check-store-exports-async.js && node scripts/check-db-adapter-exports.js
scripts.check:frontend-build: cd frontend && CI=false npm run build
scripts.check:db-canary:staging: HEALTH_DB_URL="https://mapmat-staging.up.railway.app/health/db" PARITY_URL="https://mapmat-staging.up.railway.app/health/db/parity" REQUIRE_RUNTIME=sqlite REQUIRE_RUNTIME_REQUESTED=postgres EXPECT_RUNTIME_FALLBACK=true PARITY_MAX_TOTAL_DRIFT=4 node scripts/check-db-canary.js
scripts.check:db-canary:production: HEALTH_DB_URL="https://mapmat-production.up.railway.app/health/db" PARITY_URL="https://mapmat-production.up.railway.app/health/db/parity" REQUIRE_RUNTIME=sqlite REQUIRE_RUNTIME_REQUESTED=postgres EXPECT_RUNTIME_FALLBACK=true PARITY_MAX_TOTAL_DRIFT=4 node scripts/check-db-canary.js
scripts.shadow:sync:staging: railway ssh -s mapmat -e staging "cd /app && MIGRATION_TRUNCATE=true SQLITE_DB_PATH=/app/data/mapmat.db npm run migrate:postgres"
scripts.shadow:sync:production: railway ssh -s mapmat -e production "cd /app && MIGRATION_TRUNCATE=true SQLITE_DB_PATH=/app/data/mapmat.db npm run migrate:postgres"
scripts.verify:phase5:staging:auto: npm run verify:phase5:staging || npm run verify:phase5:staging:resync
scripts.verify:phase5:production:auto: npm run verify:phase5:production || npm run verify:phase5:production:resync
scripts.verify:phase7a:staging: npm run check:db-health:staging:postgres && npm run test:smoke:staging
scripts.verify:phase7a:production: npm run check:db-health:production:postgres && npm run test:smoke:production
